title: Talking to AI
subtitle: How to actually get good results from ChatGPT, Claude, and friends
description: AI is only as useful as you know how to use it. In 5 lessons you'll go from nervous first-timer to someone who gets real answers, spots AI mistakes, and knows exactly when to reach for an AI — and when not to.

lessons.title: Your First Real Conversation with AI
lessons.subtitle: It's just a chat box — and it can do a lot more than you think

lessons.title: How to Ask Better Questions
lessons.subtitle: Vague in, vague out — here's how to actually get what you want

lessons.title: When AI Gets It Wrong (And How to Spot It)
lessons.subtitle: AI makes stuff up — confidently. Here's how to catch it.

lessons.title: AI for Everyday Tasks
lessons.subtitle: Emails, research, creative ideas — prompts you can steal right now

lessons.title: The AI Cheat Sheet
lessons.subtitle: What AI is great at, okay at, and terrible at — in plain English
